title: helianthopsis subnivea
intro: Helianthopsis subnivea, also known as the white-flowered helianthopsis or snow-white helianthopsis, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. Helianthopsis subnivea is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The plant's leaves and flowers can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues.
